reason: Swift shell entry checklist and native macOS quality bar for UI implementation.
Page-specific UI patterns for shell, run/recovery, registry, logs, and preferences.
Swift shell implementation quality constraints while refining views.
Keep UI refinements out of Rust-owned domain state and avoid Swift state-machine drift.
Preserve RelayDock product identity and avoid browser/terminal/session-manager drift.
Commit message must document the concrete reason and purpose of the change.
